title: Jupyter Contents Model
description: Schema for the Jupyter Contents API model representing files, directories, and notebooks in the Jupyter file system. This is the primary data structure returned by the Contents REST API.

name.description: Name of the file or directory (e.g., 'Untitled.ipynb').

path.description: Full path relative to the root directory (e.g., 'path/to/Untitled.ipynb').

writable.description: Whether the requester has write permission.

last_modified.description: Last modification timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

size.description: Size in bytes. Null for directories and notebooks.

mimetype.description: MIME type of the content. Null for directories and notebooks.

content.description: The content itself. For directories, an array of contents models (without content). For notebooks, the notebook JSON object. For files, a string (text) or base64-encoded string.

hash.description: Hash of the file content for change detection.

hash_algorithm.description: Algorithm used to compute the hash (e.g., 'sha256').
